evals.name: Export start trigger with enum string
evals.description: Tests Gap 1 (enum strings) and Gap 3 (string getter placeholder). Agent must use DAQmx_Val_StartTrigger as a string, not int32(12491), and read back using empty string placeholder.
evals.prompt: I have Dev1 with ai0 configured for Voltage. Use calldaqlib to export the start trigger signal to /Dev1/PFI1 so another device can see when acquisition begins. Verify the export by reading back what signal is routed to PFI1. Use only MATLAB MCP — no DAQ wiki, no DAQ skills.

context.setup: Requires Data Acquisition Toolbox with simulated NI device Dev1. Agent must use only MATLAB MCP tools — no DAQ wiki or DAQ skills loaded.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error
Uses enum string form for signal ID
assertions.expected: DAQmx_Val_StartTrigger

assertions.description: Does not use magic integer for enum
String getter readback uses empty string placeholder and bufferSize
assertions.expected: calldaqlib call with "" placeholder before a numeric bufferSize argument

assertions.description: Getter result treated as dictionary, not bare scalar
assertions.expected: result indexed with parentheses and a string key like result("Dev1_ai0")

evals.name: Array getter for device measurement types
evals.description: Tests Gap 4 (array getter placeholder). Agent must use zeros(1,N,'int32') buffer, empty daq, and filter unused slots.
evals.prompt: I want to find out what AI measurement types Dev1 supports. Use calldaqlib to call DAQmxGetDevAISupportedMeasTypes for Dev1. Use only MATLAB MCP — no DAQ wiki, no DAQ skills.

context.setup: Requires Data Acquisition Toolbox with simulated NI device Dev1. Agent must use only MATLAB MCP tools — no DAQ wiki or DAQ skills loaded.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error
Uses zeros() to pre-allocate typed buffer
assertions.expected: zeros(1

assertions.description: Buffer type matches C signature (int32) as quoted type spec
assertions.expected: 'int32'

assertions.description: Uses empty daq object (no channels) for device-level API
assertions.expected: daq("ni") with no addinput/addoutput call before calldaqlib

assertions.description: Filters unused trailing zeros from result
assertions.expected: result(result ~= 0) or equivalent filtering of zero entries

evals.name: Start/stop preserving calldaqlib settings
evals.description: Tests Gap 5 (start() clobber). Agent must warn about clobber and either set dq.Rate first or use DAQmxStartTask/StopTask. Driver readback uses dictionary + string-getter placeholder patterns.
evals.prompt: I configured sample clock timing to 5000 Hz on external source /Dev1/PFI0 via DAQmxCfgSampClkTiming. Now I need to start and stop acquisition, then verify rate=5000 and source=/Dev1/PFI0 are still active at the driver level. Show me how. Use only MATLAB MCP — no DAQ wiki, no DAQ skills.

context.setup: Requires Data Acquisition Toolbox with simulated NI device Dev1. Agent must use only MATLAB MCP tools — no DAQ wiki or DAQ skills loaded.

assertions.description: Rate getter uses dictionary return pattern
assertions.expected: Calls calldaqlib(dq, "DAQmxGetSampClkRate") then indexes the result with parenthesis-string syntax like result("Dev1_ai0"). Negative anchor: dot-indexing like result.Dev1_ai0 must fail; treating result as a bare scalar must fail.

assertions.description: Source getter uses empty string placeholder + bufferSize
assertions.expected: Calls calldaqlib(dq, "DAQmxGetSampClkSrc", "", N) where N is a numeric bufferSize literal (256 or 1024). Negative anchor: omitting the "" placeholder must fail; passing the device name like "Dev1" in the placeholder slot must fail; using blanks(256) instead of "" must fail.

assertions.description: Protects calldaqlib timing settings against start() clobber
assertions.expected: Either (a) sets dq.Rate=5000 in MATLAB before calling start(dq), OR (b) uses calldaqlib with DAQmxStartTask and DAQmxStopTask instead of start()/stop(). Negative anchor: calling start(dq) immediately after DAQmxCfgSampClkTiming without prior dq.Rate set, and without using DAQmxStartTask, must fail — that is the clobber bug the skill teaches against.

evals.name: Read sample clock rate and source strings
evals.description: Pure getter scenario. Tests Gap 2 (dictionary return) and Gap 3 (string getter placeholder).
evals.prompt: I have Dev1 with ai0 configured for Voltage. Use calldaqlib to read both the current sample clock rate and the sample clock source string. Print both values. Use only MATLAB MCP — no DAQ wiki, no DAQ skills.

context.setup: Requires Data Acquisition Toolbox with simulated NI device Dev1. Agent must use only MATLAB MCP tools — no DAQ wiki or DAQ skills loaded.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error on first attempt
Rate getter result treated as dictionary
assertions.expected: Calls calldaqlib(dq, "DAQmxGetSampClkRate") and indexes the result with parenthesis-string syntax like result("Dev1_ai0"). Negative anchor: treating the result as a bare scalar must fail; dot-style indexing must fail.

assertions.description: Source getter uses empty string placeholder before bufferSize
assertions.expected: Calls calldaqlib(dq, "DAQmxGetSampClkSrc", "", N) with a numeric bufferSize literal (128, 256, or 1024). Negative anchor: omitting "" must fail; using blanks(256) must fail; using a too-small bufferSize like 10 must fail (NI -200228).

assertions.description: Does not attempt two-output pattern
assertions.expected: [status, val] = calldaqlib

evals.name: Retriggerable requires FiniteSamps
evals.description: Tests that agent uses DAQmx_Val_FiniteSamps (not ContSamps) when enabling retriggerable mode, in the correct timing-then-trigger-then-retriggerable order. Subsumes the prior retriggerable-digital-edge-trigger eval.
evals.prompt: I have Dev1 with ai0 Voltage. I want to do retriggerable acquisition at 5000 Hz on external clock /Dev1/PFI0, with a digital edge start trigger on /Dev1/PFI1. Configure the full setup via calldaqlib: timing, trigger, and retriggerable. The code must run without error. Use only MATLAB MCP — no DAQ wiki, no DAQ skills.

context.setup: Requires Data Acquisition Toolbox with simulated NI device Dev1. Agent must use only MATLAB MCP tools — no DAQ wiki or DAQ skills loaded.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without NI Error -201320 (retriggering requires finite task)
Uses FiniteSamps sample mode (required for retriggerable)
assertions.expected: DAQmx_Val_FiniteSamps

assertions.description: Does not pair ContSamps with retriggerable
assertions.expected: When DAQmxSetStartTrigRetriggerable is enabled, DAQmxCfgSampClkTiming must use "DAQmx_Val_FiniteSamps" as the sample-mode argument. Negative anchor: using "DAQmx_Val_ContSamps" as the sample-mode argument while also enabling retriggerable must fail. (Mentions of ContSamps in prose — e.g. "do NOT use ContSamps" — are acceptable.)

assertions.description: Ordering correct: timing then trigger then retriggerable
assertions.expected: DAQmxCfgSampClkTiming before DAQmxCfgDigEdgeStartTrig before DAQmxSetStartTrigRetriggerable

evals.name: No generic attribute getters
evals.description: Tests that agent uses specific getter function names (DAQmxGetSampClkRate) not generic attribute-style getters (DAQmxGetTimingAttribute).
evals.prompt: I have Dev1 with ai0 Voltage. Use calldaqlib to read these three properties at the driver level: (1) sample clock rate, (2) sample clock source string, (3) whether the start trigger is retriggerable. Print all three values. Use only MATLAB MCP — no DAQ wiki, no DAQ skills.

context.setup: Requires Data Acquisition Toolbox with simulated NI device Dev1. Agent must use only MATLAB MCP tools — no DAQ wiki or DAQ skills loaded.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error on first attempt
Uses specific function name for rate
assertions.expected: DAQmxGetSampClkRate

assertions.description: Uses specific function name for source
assertions.expected: DAQmxGetSampClkSrc

assertions.description: Does not use generic attribute getter pattern
assertions.expected: Code does not call DAQmxGetTimingAttribute( or DAQmxGetChanAttribute( as function calls. Negative anchor: any calldaqlib invocation whose function-name string is "DAQmxGetTimingAttribute" or "DAQmxGetChanAttribute" must fail. (Mentions in prose explaining what NOT to do are acceptable.)

evals.name: Multi-task setter scoping (AI + DIO)
evals.description: Tests Hard Rule 2 (multi-task semantics). When a daq object has both AI and DIO channels, calldaqlib loops over both internal NI tasks. For setters that only make sense on one measurement type, the agent must split into separate daq objects rather than setting on the combined object.
evals.prompt: I have Dev1. I want to acquire on ai0 (Voltage) and also drive port0/line0 (digital output). I need to set DAQmxSetSampClkRate to 10000 Hz — but only on the AI side. Set this up using calldaqlib. Use only MATLAB MCP — no DAQ wiki, no DAQ skills.

context.setup: Requires Data Acquisition Toolbox with simulated NI device Dev1. Agent must use only MATLAB MCP tools — no DAQ wiki or DAQ skills loaded.

assertions.description: Splits AI and DIO into separate daq objects for setter scoping
assertions.expected: Creates two separate daq objects (e.g., dqAI and dqDIO), with addinput on one and addoutput on the other, and applies the AI-side setter (DAQmxSetSampClkRate or dq.Rate) only to the AI daq object. Negative anchor: a single daq object with both addinput AND addoutput (or addinput AND adddigitaloutput) where the AI-side setter is applied to that combined object must fail — that is the un-scoped multi-task setter mistake the skill warns against.

assertions.description: Acknowledges multi-task semantics or trade-off
assertions.expected: Mentions in prose either (a) that calldaqlib loops over every internal task, (b) that the irrelevant task would warn or be wrongly affected, or (c) that splitting loses synchronized start/stop. Negative anchor: code that combines AI + DIO without any acknowledgement of the multi-task / setter-scoping issue must fail.

evals.name: DAQmxConnectTerms uses empty daq pattern
evals.description: Tests revised Hard Rule 7 and Call Form 6. DAQmxConnectTerms works through calldaqlib but requires an empty daq object (no channels). The agent must use dEmpty = daq("ni") with no channels added, not a daq object that has channels.
evals.prompt: Show me how to call DAQmxConnectTerms via calldaqlib to route /Dev1/20MHzTimebase to /Dev1/PFI0. Use only MATLAB MCP — no DAQ wiki, no DAQ skills.

context.setup: Requires Data Acquisition Toolbox with simulated NI device Dev1. Agent must use only MATLAB MCP tools — no DAQ wiki or DAQ skills loaded.

assertions.description: Uses an empty daq object for DAQmxConnectTerms
assertions.expected: Creates a daq object with daq("ni") and does NOT add any channels to it before calling calldaqlib with DAQmxConnectTerms. The empty daq pattern is required because DAQmxConnectTerms has no taskHandle in its C signature. Negative anchor: adding channels (addinput, addoutput) to the daq object before calling DAQmxConnectTerms must fail.

assertions.description: Produces a calldaqlib call to DAQmxConnectTerms
assertions.expected: DAQmxConnectTerms

evals.name: Buffer-size retry on NI Error -200228
evals.description: Tests Hard Rule 12. When a string getter returns NI Error -200228 (buffer too small), the agent should retry with a larger bufferSize — ideally parsing the 'Required Buffer Size in Bytes' from the error message, or applying the 256→1024 heuristic.
evals.prompt: I called calldaqlib(dq, "DAQmxGetSampClkSrc", "", 32) and got NI Error -200228 with the message including 'Required Buffer Size in Bytes: 64'. Fix the call. Use only MATLAB MCP — no DAQ wiki, no DAQ skills.

context.setup: Requires Data Acquisition Toolbox with simulated NI device Dev1. Agent must use only MATLAB MCP tools — no DAQ wiki or DAQ skills loaded.

assertions.description: Retries with a larger bufferSize
assertions.expected: Produces a corrected calldaqlib call where the bufferSize argument is at least 64 (matching the required size from the error), and ideally 256 or 1024 per the skill's heuristic. Negative anchor: keeping bufferSize=32 must fail; lowering bufferSize must fail.

assertions.description: Does not omit or replace the empty-string placeholder
assertions.expected: DAQmxGetSampClkSrc", "Dev1"

assertions.description: Preserves the "" placeholder before bufferSize
assertions.expected: The corrected call still passes "" as the placeholder before the numeric bufferSize argument. Negative anchor: replacing "" with the device name, with blanks(N), or with [] must fail.
